message:
test(robot): add pagination large-payload and verbosity profile tests (bd-3pa8p)

pagination_test.go:
- TestApplyPagination_LargePayloadDeterministicNextCursor: verifies
  pagination with 105 items at limit=100 produces exactly 100 results,
  has_more=true, and next_cursor=100. Ensures deterministic cursor
  values for large payloads.

verbosity_test.go:
- TestApplyVerbosity_TerseNestedShortKeys: verifies terse profile
  applies short-key mappings recursively into nested maps and arrays
  (sessions→s, timestamp→ts, agents→a, success→ok) and removes
  _agent_hints metadata.
- TestEncodeJSON_RespectsVerbosityTerse: verifies end-to-end JSON
  encoding with terse verbosity produces shortened keys and strips
  _agent_hints from the output envelope.
- TestEncodeJSON_RespectsVerbosityDebug: verifies debug verbosity
  adds a _debug metadata map with the verbosity level and preserves
  full field names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
